summary: Iteration 208 testing complete. Phase 2 Expansion features verified: Deep-Dive Archives (Trinity View, StrokeTracer, Comparative Linguistics) and Suanpan Mixer (abacus frequency mixer with Solfeggio presets). All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Archives and Suanpan pages fully functional. Hub page with gravity field and weather ribbon working. New satellites (Archives + Suanpan) added to constants.js.

issues: Trial Graduation overlay blocks initial interaction - user must dismiss it first

archives.py: Stroke tracing with accuracy-based unlocking (>=70% unlocks) - PASS

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 208 adds Phase 2 Expansion: (1) Deep-Dive Archives at /archives with Trinity View (3 tabs: origin/synthesis/frequency), StrokeTracer for character tracing, and Comparative Linguistics panel. 6 archive entries: om-vedic, dao-chinese, qi-chinese (locked for observer), aleph-aramaic, ankh-egyptian (locked), iching-hexagram (locked). (2) Suanpan Mixer at /suanpan - ancient Chinese abacus frequency mixer with 4 columns (100s, 10s, 1s, .1s), heaven beads (worth 5) and earth beads (worth 1), 9 Solfeggio presets. (3) New satellites added to constants.js: archives and suanpan. (4) Key data-testids: archives-page, archive-entry-{id}, trinity-tab-{origin|synthesis|frequency}, stroke-tracer, play-frequency-btn, suanpan-page, suanpan-col-{n}, heaven-bead-{col}-{idx}, earth-bead-{col}-{idx}, suanpan-play-btn, preset-{name}. (5) Trial Graduation overlay may appear and needs to be dismissed with 'Continue with free plan' button.
